{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2404584?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/geo-chen", "id": 2404584, "login": "geo-chen", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI0MDQ1ODQ=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54457", "cvss": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-552", "name": "Files or Directories Accessible to External Parties"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Impact

The `/internal/object_storage` endpoint accepts a caller-supplied JSON `storage_path` parameter that dynamically overrides the TensorZero `[object_storage]` configuration.

By abusing the `filesystem` storage type, a caller can read arbitrary files from the gateway filesystem, including files that may contain sensitive credentials. Similarly, by abusing the `s3_compatible` storage type, the caller can coerce the gateway into making outbound object storage requests to attacker-chosen internal/cloud-metadata endpoints.

This vulnerability only applies when the gateway can be accessed by untrusted callers. If a developer's TensorZero deployment has authentication enabled, only authenticated callers can exploit this vulnerability. If a developer's deployment has authentication disabled, any caller can exploit this vulnerability.

### Remediation

The vulnerability has been patched in version `2026.6.0`. See PR #7527.

### Workarounds

If developers are unable to upgrade a gateway that is exposed to untrusted callers, please block external access to the `/internal/object_storage` endpoint.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-824w-x939-6cmc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-15T21:59:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-824w-x939-6cmc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-824w-x939-6cmc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54457"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-15T21:59:40Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tensorzero/tensorzero/security/advisories/GHSA-824w-x939-6cmc", "https://github.com/tensorzero/tensorzero/commit/0abbc838bae3394fe7491dad7009670d4e3b6cf8", "https://github.com/tensorzero/tensorzero/releases/tag/2026.6.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-824w-x939-6cmc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tensorzero/tensorzero/security-advisories/GHSA-824w-x939-6cmc", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tensorzero/tensorzero", "summary": "TensorZero Gateway: Arbitrary file read and SSRF in internal object storage endpoint", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-15T21:59:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-824w-x939-6cmc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "tensorzero"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: TensorZero Gateway: Arbitrary file read and SSRF in internal object storage endpoint
